text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My next day off is right around the corner. I'm
thinking of ways to make the best of it while
looking at my pocket calendar, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! By your manner and forlorn
expression, I'd wager something is troubling you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I have a keen eye for
these things! You are... looking to have a
productive day off!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then I personally invite you to my newest opera!
My monumental masterpiece, sans the interlude,
totals a grand nine hours and thirty minutes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But first, you must make like an early bird and get
up at dawn! Time shouldn't be squandered, even
on your days of rest! Greet the morning sun with
vigor!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! ☆ What's the vibe? We talking day off
plans or something?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You gotta let loose then! Gather your besties, hit
the karaoke booth, and get hyped!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Somebody say "striped"? Like
the striped cucumber beetle?! Where is it? Quick,
catch it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What are we catching? Is it something
marvelous?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Perhaps you'd like to join the chase? To
grab something that shines!
choice_data_list:
I'm just trying to think of how to spend my day
off!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You what?! Geez, why didn't you say so in the
first place?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I say go and have a nice day at the ear spa!
They're the next fad! Foot spas are out!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! What about going on a hunt for something marvelous? ☆ Whatever you find will surely be marvelous! Here, there, everywhere there's something maaarvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Why not go traveling? Adopt an international
mindset, savor some regional cuisine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, you must wake up bright and
early!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: La, la, laaa! ♪ I am l'amooour! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Get the party started!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Don't forget to check out the elbow spa!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Bon voyaaage!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆ Marvelooous! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I put all their suggestions into
action and wind up having one very stimulating
day off.
